description: Product Description Boar Hair bristles with Nylon Pin We recommend brushing twice daily The longer nylon pins and detangling balls glide through any type of hair combing out any tangles effortlessly without pulling, the brush will massage and stimulate your scalp safely stimulating the blood circulation and promoting hair growth. You can give your kids' hair the care it needs without any tears or drama. The magic of a boar bristle brush is that It distributes scalp oil evenly. After few days of using, shine, softness and health should beapparent to your hair. High Quality Bamboo Natural Boar bristles distributes natural oil which will help restore your hair's natural shine and texture. The soft bristles are flexible to avoid pulling when detangling and massaging the scalp. Top Craftsmanship The soft bristles work with a flexible rubber cushion which is designed for preventing hard pull when detangling, and also give a gentle massage feel to improve blood circulation. To view our other products JUST SEARCH RUSTIK ncluded - Natural Boar Bristle and Nylon Pin Oval Hair Brush.
